response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — all core to the role — though his stack is broader than required and lacks explicit Nest.js or Vitest usage, which are mitigated by his adaptability and deep engineering background.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience
Strong DevOps and testing practices (Docker, CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-like tools)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of recent work with PostgreSQL/MySQL or Kubernetes in enterprise context
German language barrier may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
